content.claim: Hungary's gimnázium system legally coexists in three parallel track lengths (4-year, 6-year, and 8-year), with the 6- and 8-year tracks introduced in the early 1990s as institutional add-ons to the previously single-structure 8-year basic school system.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Institutional description does not establish causal impact on student outcomes
Does not explain the original rationale for adding these tracks
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
